name: Patient 14
history: Financial difficulties after questionable investments. Increased reliance on parents for assistance.
intermediate_belief: I made stupid decisions and can't recover on my own.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll never be financially independent; I'm a perpetual child.
coping_strategies: Avoiding financial planning, depending on parents, minimizing losses.
situation: Discussion with family about future plans and potential career changes.
auto_thought: "They think I'm irresponsible. I have no real plan. I'm just pretending."
behavior: Deflects questions, makes vague promises, changes subject quickly.
